changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Torn Diary Entry"

TextENGNew: ...From then on, all I could think about was death.
When will I die?
What would be the best way to die?
What would be the most reliable way, with the smallest impact on the people around me...?
While pondering and researching such things... before I realized it, the night was over.
And when I saw the morning sun... I felt hopelessly miserable.
As much as I thought about it, I was afraid to take that first step... I'm really such a coward...
I want to die.
Truth be told, from the bottom of my heart, I feel that I want to die right now.
But... I'm always afraid, so I can't die.
I endure intense pain that drives me crazy, and I suffer from anxiety that makes me feel isolated... When I consider the possibility that I'll fail to die, I can't help but chicken out...
So, even though I've been thinking about it day in and day out, I can only continue wastefully living...
Hey, God.
If you really exist.
To prevent me from inconveniencing anyone else,
please kill me.
If I die of an illness, my family would be troubled.
Suicide or an accident would also be hard on the people around me.
Even if I ran away and went off to die alone somewhere... it would cause trouble for the police.
In that case... just erase me.
As if I was never even from this world to begin with.
Please, erase me from everyone's memories and deny me my existence.
Of course... I'm being stupid.
Begging for divine salvation is the most cowardly act I know...
